title: Neottia chenii

Neottia chenii is further categorized under the genus Neottia. This species is native to China and is a terrestrial orchid that grows in shaded, humid environments. The classification of Neottia chenii reflects its unique characteristics and its evolutionary relationships within the Orchidaceae family.
